% On the Soul and the Resurrection of St. Gregory of Nyssa, text from
% CCEL's ThML edition of NPNF Second Series, Vol. V (soulres-thml.xml,
% raw extract preserved). The body is generated by ccel2tex.py.
\documentclass[11pt,letterpaper]{article}
\ifdefined\pdfsuppressptexinfo\pdfsuppressptexinfo=-1 \fi
\ifdefined\pdftrailerid\pdftrailerid{}\fi
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
% Greek: with texlive-langgreek installed (LGR encoding + textalpha)
% Greek renders in Greek type; without it the build still succeeds.
\IfFileExists{textalpha.sty}{%
  \usepackage[LGR,T1]{fontenc}%
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}%
  \usepackage{textalpha}%
}{%
  \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}%
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}%
}
\ifdefined\ensuregreek
  \newcommand{\textgreek}[1]{\ensuregreek{#1}}
\else
  \newcommand{\textgreek}[1]{\emph{[Greek]}}
\fi
\newcommand{\texthebrew}[1]{{\emph{[Hebrew]}}}
\usepackage{mathpazo}
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{needspace}
\usepackage[colorlinks=true,linkcolor=ink,urlcolor=maroon,citecolor=ink,filecolor=ink]{hyperref}
\urlstyle{same}
\hypersetup{pdftitle={On the Soul and the Resurrection},pdfauthor={Gregory of Nyssa}}
\linespread{1.06}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{1.5em}

\definecolor{ink}{HTML}{2A2521}
\definecolor{heading}{HTML}{8C4A32}
\definecolor{subhead}{HTML}{6E5642}
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{B0894C}
\definecolor{maroon}{HTML}{7B2E2E}

\newcommand{\xchapter}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{1.4em}\phantomsection\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{#1}%
  \needspace{4\baselineskip}%
  {\normalfont\fontsize{13}{16}\selectfont\bfseries\color{heading}%
   \raggedright\emergencystretch=1.5em #1\par}%
  \vspace{2pt}{\color{accent}\hrule height 1pt}\medskip}

\newcommand{\xsection}[1]{%
  \needspace{3\baselineskip}\par\medskip
  {\normalfont\bfseries\color{subhead}\raggedright\emergencystretch=1.5em #1\par}%
  \nobreak\smallskip}
\newcommand{\xsubsection}[1]{\xsection{#1}}

\begin{document}
\color{ink}

\begin{center}
{\LARGE\bfseries\color{heading} On the Soul and the Resurrection\par}
\vspace{1.2em}
{\large St. Gregory of Nyssa\par}
\vspace{0.6em}
{Translated by William Moore and Henry Austin Wilson.\par}
\vspace{0.4em}
{\color{accent}\hrule height 1pt}
\end{center}
\vspace{1em}

\input{soulres-body.tex}

\vspace{2em}
{\small\noindent From \emph{A Select Library of Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers
of the Christian Church}, Second Series, Volume V, edited by Philip Schaff
and Henry Wace, 1893. The translation is in the public domain.\par}

\end{document}
